hero.name: Nguyen Thi Dieu Hang
hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.tagline: I'm passionate about building end-to-end web applications. This website is not only my personal portfolio but also includes an AI assistant running directly in the browser, ready to answer questions about my background, skills, and projects.

about.heading: About
about.body: I'm a Software Engineering graduate from HUTECH with hands-on experience across front-end and back-end web development, including an internship at Viet Japan Partner. I'm Microsoft Azure (AZ-900) certified, a fast learner, and eager to grow as a Full Stack Developer building scalable, user-friendly applications.

exp1.desc: Developed web interfaces and integrated APIs. Collaborated with the team on feature development and testing, and gained hands-on experience with system design and backend integration.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.empty: No projects to show yet. Tag a repo with the "portfolio" topic on GitHub.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro: Have an opportunity or a question? Send me a message and I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
